caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with gold "BOSS" lettering sits at a desk in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo with five gold stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE," as well as a blue banner that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him, and a black branded mug sits on the desk to his right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, gesturing slightly with his right hand. As the frames progress, he shifts his head slightly and adjusts his expression while continuing to talk into the microphone. A small black logo with a white circular icon and red text is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
